hero.research: Research interests: FLE didactics · AI-assisted language teaching · Project-based learning

items.org: School of Foreign Languages, Jinan University
items.desc: Teaching French Listening, French as a Second Foreign Language, Tourism French and other courses. Research focuses on FLE didactics, AI-assisted language learning, and project-based pedagogy.
Certified examiner-corrector for DELF/DALF written and oral examinations at levels A1 to B2, accredited by France Éducation International.
Provided consecutive interpretation for the French troupe Piaf le Spectacle during the La Vie en Rose production — covering a public talking salon and a live interview with Canton Radio.
On-camera reporter for the Global Live programme, responsible for news writing, field interviews, video editing and subtitle translation.

about.title: About
about.bio: I am a Lecturer in French at the School of Foreign Languages, Jinan University. I hold a Master's degree in French Language Teaching (FLE) from the Université de Lorraine, France. Since joining Jinan University in 2020, I have been teaching French listening, French as a second foreign language, and project-based French video production courses, with a focus on integrating AI technology and project-based approaches into foreign language education. I also independently developed OuiOuiAI, an intelligent French learning platform, to translate pedagogical ideas into practical tools.

items.title: Une pratique innovante en pédagogie par projets : création audiovisuelle en français pour les étudiants chinois
items.titleFr: An Innovative Practice in Project-Based Pedagogy: Audiovisual Creation in French for Chinese Students

teaching.title: Teaching
teaching.subtitle: Approx. 216 teaching hours per semester. Several courses consistently ranked in the top 10% of the School's evaluations.
courses: French as a Second Foreign Language I–III
Sino-French Brand Communication & New Media Practice (Micro-major)

items.name: OuiOuiAI – Intelligent French Learning Platform
items.desc: A self-developed web application for French learners, featuring AI-powered vocabulary lookup, word notebook, verb conjugation practice, creative dictation, and a wrong-answer tracker.

items.name: Jinan University Gold Course (HMT-Overseas Special)
items.desc: Tourism French course approved as a Gold Course, integrating project-based learning with short-video creation in French. Student-produced videos are published on Bilibili.

items.name: University Teaching Reform Project
items.desc: Research on innovative French teaching practice combining French instruction, short-video creation and storytelling for HMT-overseas Chinese students.

items.name: Innovation Project: Olympics on Campus
items.desc: Co-supervised a university-level student innovation project around the 2024 Paris Olympics: built a Chinese-French bilingual short-video matrix (180,000+ total views) and ran French language workshops in 5 schools, reaching 231 participants. Recognized by Jinan University Alumni Association and the French Embassy in China.

items.name: Mandarin Teaching at International Communities
items.desc: Supervised students in teaching Mandarin Chinese to French- and English-speaking residents at Wushan and Liede International Communities in Guangzhou, promoting Chinese language outreach.
Third Prize, Jinan University Essay Competition on Educational Evaluation Reform
Outstanding Supervisor Award, Times Cannes Young Director Award
Outstanding Student Society Supervisor, Jinan University

footer.text: Language is the bridge, culture is the shore.
